verdict_reason: All new dependencies (azure-messaging-servicebus, testcontainers azure/mssqlserver, mssql-jdbc) are verified in use, no secrets, and the re-added jacoco-check at 0.65 matches the project convention; only two Minor BOM-usage nits remain.

todos.issue: azure-messaging-servicebus version 7.17.11 is pinned directly on the artifact instead of importing the Azure SDK BOM (com.azure:azure-sdk-bom) in dependencyManagement; future Azure artifacts (e.g. azure-identity when SAS auth is swapped per the ticket) can drift out of sync
todos.fix: Import com.azure:azure-sdk-bom in dependencyManagement (alongside the existing AWS BOM) and drop the explicit version from azure-messaging-servicebus

todos.issue: Per-artifact <version>${testcontainers.version}</version> on org.testcontainers:azure and :mssqlserver is redundant — spring-boot-starter-parent already imports the testcontainers BOM and honours the testcontainers.version property override set at line 27
todos.fix: Keep the <testcontainers.version>1.21.4</testcontainers.version> property override and remove the explicit <version> elements from both testcontainers dependencies so they resolve via the Boot-managed testcontainers BOM
